description: CRIT-707 passThreshold `grep -c "dispatch" promptnotes/src/lib/editor/tauriEditorAdapter.ts outputs exactly 16` is structurally unreliable. The adapter file contains `dispatch` substrings on (a) 16 method definition lines (`dispatchFocusBlock`, etc.), (b) multiple JSDoc comment lines that reference `dispatch* methods`, `dispatch_xxx`, etc., and (c) the file-header overview which mentions `16 dispatch* methods`. `grep -c` counts matching lines, so the comment lines pad the result above 16. The 16-method invariant cannot be checked by this threshold; either a more targeted regex (e.g., `^\s*dispatch[A-Z]`) or an AST-level check is required. As written, the criterion is non-evaluable.

evidence.snippet: Header comment line 18 says `16 dispatch* methods` (matches `dispatch`). Comment line 38 says `subscribeToState method is NOT implemented here -- use editorStateChannel.ts for inbound state subscriptions`. Multiple internal comments reference `dispatchTriggerIdleSave` etc. Counting all lines containing `dispatch` exceeds 16.
